Sources: CNN D23 live, AJ liveblog D23, CBS live, CNBC, AP, Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, OilPriceAPI, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Euronews, NCRI, Iran International, JPost, Fox News, PBS, WSJ, Haaretz, Israel Hayom, ToI, ABC News, WashPost, Al-Monitor, SCMP, The National, GCaptain, Stimson, FDD LWJ, Goldman Sachs, IEA, Bahrain MoD, Saudi MoD, UK MoD, NetBlocks, Gulf News, Newsweek, Middle East Eye, Chatham House, Tasnim.

48-HOUR COUNTDOWN — DEADLINE APPROACHING (~MONDAY MORNING): Trump's 48-hr ultimatum to 'obliterate' Iran's power plants if Hormuz not reopened is now the single defining variable. Saturday night → Monday morning deadline. Iran counter-threat: 'ALL energy/IT/desalination in region targeted.' Ghalibaf reiterated: 'irreversible damage' to region if power plants struck. No sign of de-escalation. IDF new Tehran strikes on Sunday = escalation continuing.

IDF 'WIDE-SCALE' STRIKES ON IRAN + LEBANON — 200+ TARGETS: IDF launched simultaneous 'wide-scale' waves of strikes on Iran and Hezbollah over weekend. In Iran: dozens of compounds storing weapons and ballistic missiles struck. Israel DM Katz: strikes will 'INCREASE SIGNIFICANTLY' this week. IDF Chief Zamir: 'HALFWAY.' = US-ISRAEL DIVERGENCE deepening (Trump 'won' vs Katz 'increase significantly').

IRGC CLAIMS 3RD FIGHTER JET SHOT DOWN: IRGC claimed F-16 shot down over central Iran at 3:45 AM Saturday. Also claimed intercepting US-Israeli armed drone over Tehran before it could operate. IRGC: 'destroyed 200+ aircraft including drones, cruise missiles, tankers, and fighter jets in 3 weeks.' Israeli military partially acknowledged — pilots survived.

SAUDI: 3 BALLISTIC AT RIYADH + ~60 DRONES: Saudi tracked 3 ballistic missiles targeting Riyadh — 1 intercepted, 2 fell uninhabited. Also downed ~60 drones targeting eastern province energy facilities. UAE: 4 ballistic + 25 drones intercepted.

IRAN UN MARITIME REP: 'HORMUZ OPEN TO ALL EXCEPT ENEMIES': First official articulation of selective Hormuz framework. Iran effectively framing this as NOT a total blockade but a weaponized passage. Significant for negotiation dynamics — potential off-ramp.

INTERNET BLACKOUT DAY 23 — LONGEST IN IRAN'S HISTORY: NetBlocks confirms blackout now longest in Iran's history. Only Sudan and Myanmar (military coups) have experienced longer. Amnesty: 'deliberate shutdown for suppression, not infrastructure damage.' Communications Minister: costing economy $35.7M/day.

LEBANON: 1,024+ KILLED (UPDATED): MoPH revised up from 1,001+. 2,584 wounded. 118 children. 1M+ displaced. IDF expanding ground operations south of Litani River. Bridges over Litani destroyed. IDF Shoshani: operations against Hezbollah 'at least 3 more weeks.'
HOUTHI RESTRAINT — DAY 23: Still out. No change in posture. Al-Houthi: 'fingers on trigger.' Key variable: if Trump strikes power plants, Iran may activate Houthis = BOTH chokepoints.

OIL D23: Brent $112.19 (Friday close = highest of war, still reference). Weekend markets limited. Open $107.17, range $105-$113. EIA forecast: above $95/b for 2 months, below $80/b by Q3. Goldman: favorable = $70s Q4.

sitrep: 48-HOUR COUNTDOWN — DEADLINE APPROACHING: Trump's ultimatum to 'obliterate' power plants if Hormuz not reopened expires ~Monday morning. NO SIGN OF DE-ESCALATION. Ghalibaf reiterated 'irreversible damage' to regional infrastructure. Iran UN maritime rep: Hormuz 'open to all except enemies' — potential off-ramp framing but not yielding. 22-country coalition still building. CENTCOM: Iran Hormuz capability 'degraded.'

IDF 'WIDE-SCALE' STRIKES — 200+ TARGETS: IDF launched simultaneous 'wide-scale' waves on Iran + Lebanon over weekend. In Iran: dozens of compounds storing weapons and ballistic missiles. New attacks on Tehran Sunday — explosions in east of capital. Israel DM Katz: US-Israeli strikes will 'INCREASE SIGNIFICANTLY' this week. US-ISRAEL DIVERGENCE deepening: Trump 'won the war' vs Katz 'increase significantly.'

IRGC CLAIMS 3RD FIGHTER JET + DRONE INTERCEPTION: IRGC claimed F-16 shot down over central Iran Saturday 3:45 AM. Also intercepted US-Israeli armed drone over Tehran. IRGC: 'destroyed 200+ aircraft in 3 weeks' including drones, cruise missiles, tankers, fighter jets. Israeli military partially acknowledged — claimed pilots survived.

SAUDI: 3 BALLISTIC AT RIYADH + 60 DRONES: Saudi tracked 3 ballistic missiles at capital — 1 intercepted, 2 fell uninhabited area. ~60 drones targeting eastern province energy facilities. UAE: 4 ballistic + 25 drones intercepted. Bahrain continued intercepts.

IRAN UN REP: 'HORMUZ OPEN EXCEPT ENEMIES': First formal articulation of selective passage framework. Iran framing Hormuz as NOT total blockade but weaponized passage. Significant for negotiation dynamics — potential diplomatic off-ramp. But Trump demanding FULL reopening.

INTERNET BLACKOUT DAY 23 — LONGEST IN IRAN HISTORY: NetBlocks confirms longest blackout in Iran's history. Only Sudan and Myanmar (coups) experienced longer. Amnesty: 'deliberate shutdown for suppression.' Communications Minister: $35.7M/day economic loss. 80% online sales collapse.

LEBANON 1,024+ KILLED (REVISED UP): MoPH confirmed 1,024+ killed including 118 children. 2,584 wounded. 1M+ displaced. IDF expanding ground ops south of Litani — bridges destroyed. IDF Shoshani: operations 'at least 3 more weeks.' Hezbollah continued attacks on IDF positions.

HOUTHI RESTRAINT — DAY 23: Still out. No change in posture. Abdul Malik al-Houthi: 'fingers on trigger.' Key variable: if Trump strikes power plants Monday, Iran may activate Houthis = BOTH chokepoints close simultaneously. ICG: building up forces, recruiting, reinforcing Red Sea coast.

OIL $112 (WEEKEND): Friday close $112.19 = highest of war. Weekend limited trading, open $107.17, range $105-$113. Monday opening will be CRITICAL — if deadline passes without resolution, expect surge. EIA: above $95/b for 2 months. Goldman favorable = $70s Q4.

CASUALTIES UPDATED: Iran 1,444+ killed (AJ). 18,000+ injured. ~5,900+ Hengaw extrapolated D23. Lebanon 1,024+ (revised up). Israel 100+ wounded Dimona/Arad. US 13 KIA, ~200 wounded. Gulf 21+. Iraq 61+.

عربستان ۳ بالستیک ریاض + ۶۰ پهپاد استان شرقی. امارات ۴ بالستیک + ۲۵ پهپاد.
نماینده ایران: هرمز 'جز دشمنان' = چارچوب عبور انتخابی. پتانسیل دیپلماتیک اما ترامپ بازگشایی کامل.
اینترنت ۲۳ = طولانی‌ترین تاریخ ایران. عفو بین‌الملل: 'سرکوب.' $۳۵.۷ میلیون/روز.
لبنان ۱,۰۲۴+ کشته (اصلاح). عملیات زمینی لیطانی. پل‌ها تخریب. ۳+ هفته دیگر.
حوثی بیرون ۲۳. بدون تغییر. اگر نیروگاه = حوثی فعال = هر دو تنگه.

theoryEvaluation.title: 48-HOUR DEADLINE — Monday morning defines the war
theoryEvaluation.body: THE SINGLE MOST IMPORTANT VARIABLE. Trump's 48-hr ultimatum expires ~Monday morning. Three outcomes: (1) TRUMP STRIKES POWER PLANTS: Iran counter-targets ALL regional energy/IT/desalination. Houthis activate = both chokepoints. 90M Iranians without electricity. Total war. Oil surge past $120+. (2) TRUMP BACKS DOWN: Credibility damaged. Iran emboldened. But de-escalation signal. Protracted attrition resumes. Oil may stabilize. (3) PARTIAL DEAL: Iran UN rep 'open except enemies' = selective passage framework. Trump claims 'victory' while Hormuz partially functions. Most creative outcome but requires both sides to save face. IDF 200+ targets + Katz 'increase significantly' = Israel escalating regardless of what Trump does on power plants. US-Israel divergence is the sub-narrative.

theoryEvaluation.title: IDF 200+ targets — the campaign is accelerating
theoryEvaluation.body: 'Wide-scale' strikes on 200+ targets over weekend. Dozens of weapons compounds. Katz: 'increase significantly.' Zamir: 'HALFWAY.' This is NOT a war winding down — it is a war INTENSIFYING. Israel has its own timeline independent of Trump's Hormuz ultimatum. Lebanon ground ops expanding south of Litani (bridges destroyed, 3+ more weeks). Israel operating on TWO fronts simultaneously. The gap between Trump ('won the war') and Israel ('increase significantly') is the widest of the conflict.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRGC 200+ aircraft claim — capability narrative
theoryEvaluation.body: IRGC claims 200+ coalition aircraft destroyed in 3 weeks: drones, cruise missiles, tankers, fighter jets. 3rd fighter jet (F-16) claimed shot down. Armed drone intercepted over Tehran. Whether these claims are accurate or inflated, they serve a critical PURPOSE: maintaining the narrative of Iranian capability and resilience. Combined with daily launches continuing into week 4, Dimona/Arad success (D22), and Diego Garcia (4,000 km) — Iran's capability narrative is credible enough to sustain the deterrence logic underlying the counter-threat to Trump's ultimatum.

theoryEvaluation.title: Iran 'open except enemies' — diplomatic seed
theoryEvaluation.body: NEW: Iran UN maritime representative stated Hormuz 'open to all except enemies.' This is the FIRST formal articulation of a selective passage framework. Analysis: (1) It reframes Iran's position from 'total blockade' to 'weaponized passage with rules.' (2) It creates space for countries NOT at war with Iran (China, India, most of Asia) to transit. (3) It implies Iran would accept partial reopening if defined on its terms. (4) It gives Trump a potential face-saving formula: if 'enemies' is narrowly defined and passage for allies/neutrals resumes, Trump could claim Hormuz is 'opening.' (5) But Trump demanded FULL reopening — 'open except enemies' may not satisfy. Key development to watch.
